backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for StyleFlow, including user profiles, brand profiles, product catalogs, social post generation, and scheduled post management with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product feature (brand profile setup, AI content generation, scheduling, dashboard analytics) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key details of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the StyleFlow app, setting the page title and preloading Inter and Playfair Display fonts from Google Fonts before mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with an authentication guard (showing LoginPage or ProfileSetupModal as needed) and wires all four page routes under the shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering the Navigation sidebar alongside page content via TanStack Router's Outlet, with responsive desktop/mobile padding and a dark-themed Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation component providing a fixed desktop sidebar and a mobile top bar with drawer, including links to all pages, user avatar display, and Internet Identity login/logout handling.
frontend/src/components/PlatformIcon.tsx: Reusable React component that renders platform-specific icons (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, TikTok) using react-icons/si with configurable size, color, and optional label display.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to set up their StyleFlow profile, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/SchedulePostDial: A dialog for scheduling a social media post by selecting a platform, date, and time, then calling the `useSchedulePost` mutation to persist the scheduled post.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using TanStack Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity state for Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for the app, covering user profiles, brand profiles, products, AI post generation, and scheduled posts via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with OKLCH-based dark-mode design tokens, and defines utility classes for coral gradients and glass-card effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/BrandProfileSetup.tsx: A form page for creating/editing a brand profile (name, tone, audience, logo) and adding products to a catalog, using React Query mutations and file upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: A calendar view page that displays scheduled social media posts by month, allowing users to filter by platform, update post status, and delete posts.
frontend/src/pages/ContentGenerator.tsx: An AI content generation page where users select a product and platform to generate optimized social media captions and hashtags, with options to copy or schedule the result.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main dashboard page showing a hero banner, aggregate metrics (total posts, published, reach, engagement), and a list of recent posts across platforms.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: A landing/login page for the StyleFlow app that displays feature highlights and triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/utils/analytics.ts: Utility functions for computing per-platform and aggregate social media metrics (reach, engagement, post counts) from scheduled post data, plus number formatting and nanosecond timestamp conversion.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color palettes (coral, amber, charcoal, sidebar), custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for an AI-powered social media content automation prototype for a clothing retail brand, tracking existing features, architectural notes, image requirements, and versioning.
